objective: Authorize Codex to prepare Route B implementation after Claude audit, under the active AGENT_AUTHORITY_MATRIX_V2 semaphore model.

claude_audit_summary.risk: HIGH if implementation maps one Excel row directly to one visit
codex_allowed_without_red_authorization: create SQL DDL files with -- NO APPLY header
orange_cross_audit_required_for: integrating new source into existing production pipeline

allowed_actions: ask Codex to create additive Route B implementation plan
ask Codex to create additive loader script if it does not modify existing loader
ask Codex to create tests and dry-run validation
ask Codex to create SQL DDL files only with -- NO APPLY header
forbidden_actions: modify existing production loader without ORANGE audit
modify active contract without ORANGE audit
codex_required_evidence: Claude audit response for ORANGE areas
close_condition: Codex plan or additive implementation evidence exists
PR reviewed and merged to main
